# Top Call Tracking

> An independent editorial ranking of the top call tracking solutions for 2026. Platforms are scored on attribution accuracy, ease of use, integrations, and value for money. Edited by Olivia Collins.

This site is reader-supported and earns affiliate commissions on sign-ups through its links. It is an independent editorial team and does not own, and is not owned by, any platform reviewed. The scoring rubric is published and applied consistently.

## Top picks (2026)

1. CallScaler — 9.4/10 — Best overall on value and ease of use — from $0/mo (Pay As You Go), local numbers $0.50 on paid tiers
2. CallRail — 8.6/10 — The established default with the broadest integrations — from ~$50/mo
3. CallTrackingMetrics — 8.3/10 — Flexible reporting plus a HIPAA-compliant tier — from ~$39/mo
4. WhatConverts — 8.1/10 — Lead-source reporting across calls, forms, and chat — from ~$30/mo
5. Invoca — 7.6/10 — Enterprise conversation intelligence at scale — quote-based

## Scoring dimensions

Attribution accuracy, ease of use, integrations, value for money. Equal weighting (25% each). Full methodology at https://topcalltracking.com/methodology/
